fields.name: Reminder No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reminder number.
The program copies the number from the Reminder No. field on the reminder line.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line's number.
The program copies the number from the Line No. field on the reminder line.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the entry number for the customer ledger entry the reminder line was created for.
The program copies the number from the Entry No. field on the reminder line.

fields.name: No. of Reminders
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number that indicates the reminder level.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the customer ledger entry that this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date of the customer ledger entry this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the customer ledger entry this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the customer ledger entry this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies an entry description, based on the contents of the Type field.

fields.name: Original Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the original amount of the customer ledger entry that this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining amount of the customer ledger entry this reminder line is for.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in the currency of the reminder.

fields.name: Interest Rate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the interest rate that applies to this reminder line.
The program copies the interest rate from the Interest Rate field on the reminder line.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general product posting group of the general ledger account this reminder line is for if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the general product posting group from the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field on the reminder line.
The Gen. Prod. Posting Group field is blank if the reminder line does not contain a G/L account entry.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT percentage that was used when the line was posted to the general ledger account if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the VAT % from the VAT % field on the reminder line.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which VAT calculation type was used when VAT was calculated if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the type from the VAT Calculation Type field on the reminder line.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT amount in the currency of the reminder.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax group code of the general ledger account this reminder line is for if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the code from the Tax Group Code field on the reminder line.
This field is blank if the issued reminder line does not contain a G/L account entry.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
If the Type field contains "G/L Account":

This field contains the VAT product posting group of the G/L account this issued reminder line is for.


The program copies the code from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field on the reminder line, when the reminder is issued.


If the Type field contains "Customer Ledger Entry":

This field contains the VAT product posting group of the Interest Account of the Customer Posting Group of the customer this reminder line is for.


The program copies the code from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field on the reminder line, when the reminder is issued.


If the Type field does not contain G/L Account or Customer Ledger Entry, this field is blank.

fields.name: VAT Identifier
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Automatically copies the value from the VAT Identifier field in the VAT Posting Setup window.

fields.name: Line Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of the issued reminder line.
The following table describes the options.


Option


Description


Reminder Line

The line contains an overdue amount.


Not Due

The line contains the amount that is not overdue yet.


Beginning Text

The line contains the text that starts the reminder.


Ending Text

The line contains the text that ends the reminder.


Rounding

The line contains the rounding amount.


OnHold

The line contains the reminder that is created by entries that are marked On Hold.


Additional Fee

The line contains additional fee.

fields.name: VAT Clause Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT Clause Code that is associated with the sales line.
After you post a sales document, the VAT Clause Code that is associated with the document is copied to the issued reminder line.

fields.name: Applies-To Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-To Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: System-Created Entry
fields.tooltip:
Contains information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.
The information is stored when you archive a sales quote, purchase quote, or order. The information is copied from the Sales Header or Purchase Header table.
For more information, see Help for the related field.
